statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: The input will be a set of strings and a target string.
statement.outputFormat: The output should be the result of inserting the target string into the trie.
statement.notes: Note that the order of insertion does not affect the correctness of the trie.

examples.explanation: The target string "abc" is not inserted into the trie, and the target string "abcg" is inserted into the trie.

hints.text: The logic for inserting a string into the trie is generally correct, but there's a specific case that causes the current implementation to fail.

editorial.title: Fixing Trie Insertion Order
commonMistakes: Not considering the case when the current node is null.

functionSignature.cpp: void insert(TrieNode* root, const string& word);
functionSignature.java: public void insert(TrieNode root, String word);
